name: Predict Everything, Forever
text:
Before any die is rolled or any coin is flipped anywhere at the table, you must first predict the result out loud. (This applies to every roll and flip for the rest of the game. Yes, all of them. You agreed to this when it resolved.)
Each time you predict correctly, you draw a card. Each time you are wrong, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock.
If you ever forget to predict before a roll or flip, put three doom counters on the Doomsday Clock and the table is allowed to gloat.
flavorText: Omniscience comes with terms and conditions and a great deal of paperwork.
